title: Resolution Authorizing the Municipal Government of Los Baños Through the Local Chief Executive Honorable Mayor Anthony F. Genuino to Enter Into and Sign in a Memorandum of Agreement MOA) with the University of the Philippines Los Baños (UPLB) for the Bs Nutrition Interns to Undergo Practicum in the Municipality of Los Baños. (AUTHOR: COUNCILOR MARK LESTER B. DIZON, 11/07/2022)
